description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and a deep green finish. The front face is divided into three horizontal sections, each representing a drawer with no visible handles, contributing to its sleek appearance. The unit stands on slender, metallic legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, adding a touch of elegance and lightness. The sides and back are plain, maintaining the clean lines and uniform color throughout. The drawers are likely constructed from wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the legs and internal mechanisms. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern offices, or residential interiors.
description: A modern, green chest of drawers with three handle-less drawers and slim metallic legs, featuring a minimalist and sleek design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal drawers with a seamless, handle-less design and slim metallic legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid green panel and the depth of the chest, with metallic legs visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned green back panel and the metallic legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid green side and metallic legs.
